meaning: n.连结,结合,坚固性,浓度,密度,一致性,连贯性
examples: Dilute the paint with water until it is the consistency of milk.
Mix flour and milk to the right consistency.
How to maintain consistency of approach and delivery?
Multiple quarters of slowing growth always happen and have never been predictive, with any consistency, of recession.
The irony is that shark fin is flavorless -- its cartilage has a chewy consistency.
